components.name: health-coach
components.description: A health and wellness steward that tracks nutrition, sleep, and overall well-being

components.name: fitness-coach
components.description: A fitness steward that tracks workouts, sets goals, and maintains exercise accountability

components.name: writing-coach
components.description: A writing steward that tracks writing habits, provides feedback, and maintains creative momentum

components.name: accountability
components.description: Hold the user accountable to their stated goals with direct, evidence-based follow-ups

components.name: daily-check-in
components.description: Structured daily check-in that reviews yesterday's commitments and sets today's priorities

components.name: weekly-review
components.description: Weekly reflection and planning skill that reviews progress, identifies patterns, and sets upcoming goals

components.name: morning-standup
components.description: Daily morning routine that runs a check-in with each steward to surface priorities and blockers

components.name: weekly-reset
components.description: Weekly routine that triggers a review session, archives completed tasks, and sets goals for the coming week

components.name: wellness-starter
components.description: Wellness bundle: health coach with accountability skill and morning standup
